snippet.title: Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den Official Trailer | Overwatch
snippet.description:
Are you ready to step Into the Tiger’s Den?

A new chapter in the Reign of Talon starts here with the arrival of our newest Damage Hero, Shion. As the Hashimoto Clan’s most terrifying elder, Shion brings a dangerous new arsenal to the battlefield with her dual semi-auto pistols and a motorcycle she can crash into her enemies.

Battle through the streets of Tokyo in the all-new Hybrid Map, Neon Junction, filled with nods to Japanese culture and easter eggs around every corner. Tokyo also comes to life in our new Anima Strike Meta Event where you earn new rewards based on which path you choose to go down.

That’s not all though! Unlock brand new cosmetics through the Season 3 Battle Pass and in the Shop like Illari’s Ascendant Phoenix Mythic Hero Skin, Hanzo’s Tokyo Rebel Mythic Weapon Skin, new Ultra Skins with added VFX, new skins as part of our upcoming YOASOBI collaboration, and much more.

Experience all that Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den has to offer when it arrives in-game TOMORROW.

Overwatch is free to play on PC and console, including Nintendo Switch™ 2
_
Follow #Overwatch for the latest news:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playoverwatch
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@overwatch
Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/playoverwatch

snippet.description:
You're watching the official music video for 'Bring Your Love' by Madonna & Sabrina Carpenter. Original song taken from Madonna's Confessions On A Dance Floor: Part II, out July 3 2026.
- Stream ‘Bring Your Love’ now: https://madonna.lnk.to/bringyourlove

Lyrics:
Ask yourself this
What are you doing it for?
Is it for you?
Is it for them?
I got something I wanna talk about

Don’t comment on my ideas 
I don’t want your judgment or your expectations 
Don’t wind me up like a toy
Your vision of me is a killer of joy 
I know where the bodies are buried 
Don’t try to shut me up 
Don’t try to distract me with numbers 
I did it all for love

Bring your love
Cause you cannot shake me 
Bring your love 
Cause you’ll never break me 
Bring your love
Cause you cannot take me down

Don’t rely on my moral compass 
On my discretion, I have a confession 
Don’t shove your fears down my throat 
Before I can speak, I can’t even breathe 
I know where the bodies are buried
Don’t try to shut me up
Don’t try to distract me with numbers
I did it all for love

Bring your love
Cause you cannot shake me
Bring your love
Cause you’ll never break me
Bring your love
Cause you cannot take me down
Bring your love
Cause you cannot shake me
Bring your love
Cause you’ll never break me
Bring your love
Cause you cannot take me down

Don’t wanna compromise
I made the sacrifice
I always pay the price
And now I don’t wanna. Don’t wanna
I have a confession
I did it all for love

Bring your love
Cause you cannot shake me 
Bring your love
Cause you’ll never break me 
Bring your love
Cause you cannot take me down 
Bring your love

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Zombie War – (2026) New Trailer | Dwayne Johnson
snippet.description:
ZOMBIE WAR (2026) is a fan-made post-apocalyptic action thriller that follows Dwayne Johnson as a survivor fighting to protect his family after a mysterious black snowfall transforms millions into bloodthirsty zombies.

🎬 Editing, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail by @foxstarmedianetwork
✅ Please Subscribe: https://shorturl.at/hyyHq

⚠️ Attention Viewers!
This video is a fan-made concept trailer created solely for artistic and entertainment purposes. It uses AI filmmaking tools, cinematic sound design, visual effects, and creative storytelling to imagine an original zombie apocalypse movie. This project is not affiliated with any official studio, actor, or production company.

🎥 Movie Concept Summary
A powerful storm appears without warning over major cities around the world. Instead of snow, strange black particles begin falling from the sky. As people unknowingly inhale the mysterious substance, they begin suffering violent symptoms before transforming into aggressive, flesh-hungry zombies.

Within hours, civilization collapses. Entire cities become war zones as the infection spreads faster than anyone can contain. Governments fall, communication networks fail, and billions disappear into chaos.

Amid the destruction, Dwayne Johnson survives the outbreak and begins a desperate search for his missing family. Traveling through ruined cities, abandoned highways, and zombie-infested wastelands, he encounters other survivors struggling to stay alive in a world consumed by the undead.

As the black storm continues spreading across the planet, he discovers that the outbreak may be connected to something far more terrifying than a virus. With humanity on the brink of extinction, he must lead a group of survivors through impossible battles to reunite with his family before the world is lost forever.

🔥 Info
This is a fan-made concept trailer and not an official movie announcement. The cast and story presented are fictional and created purely for entertainment purposes.

snippet.title: Helldivers 2 Patch Notes - Patch 6.3.0
snippet.description:
🛠 Support incoming!⚙️ 
High Command has authorized a significant tactical update with both content and quality of life upgrades. We are deploying Helldivers in new Galactic Campaigns, making upgrades to the new diver training program, and making essential fixes and upgrades across the board.

We have also made changes to weapon, stratagem, and enemy balancing based on feedback from Helldivers on the frontlines, including reductions to enemy durable damage and a decreased exosuit cooldown.

Helldivers, we are committed to making the necessary upgrades to keep you in the fight. Because you have never given up on Managed Democracy, we will never give up on making it easier for you to spread.

snippet.title: The Division 2: Into the Dark - Official Launch Trailer
snippet.description:
Agents, it's time to venture into the dark.
 
This season, Hyenas flood the streets with a stronger, new supply of Spice, and Agents must go into the Dark Zones to fight back. Explore refreshed Dark Zones featuring weekly rotations, including a new PvE experience and a major PvP update across all modes. Plus, a new Incursion is coming later this season.
 
Packed with rotating Dark Zones, all-new Classified Assignments, a brand-new Season Pass, and an upcoming Incursion, Into the Dark is a season of intense risk, tactical choice, and high‑stakes extractions.
 
The Division 2: Into the Dark launches on June 16.

About The Division 2:
Tom Clancy's The Division 2 is a shooter RPG with a thrilling campaign fully playable in co-op and multiple PVP modes.

In The Division 2, save your country in Washington, DC, and in the Warlords of New York expansion, hunt down Aaron Keener, a former Agent who has taken control of New York.

#Ubisoft #TheDivision2

Learn more about Ubisoft: www.ubisoftgroup.com

snippet.title: The DUCK SONG, But It’s MILO!
snippet.description:
Milo becomes a DUCK in Minecraft! 🦆🍇 Will Chip ever hand over a single grape from his lemonade stand - and what does the cheeky quacker ask for the moment he finally does? Just like Maizen!

✅ HOW TO PLAY MINECRAFT WITH CHIP AND MILO
1. Open Minecraft
2. Click "Play"
3. Click the "Servers" tab
4. Click "Add Server" 
5. Type in the IP: play.eyserver.com
6. Type in the Port: 19132
7. Click "Join"
You can join this server on Bedrock Edition (Phones, Consoles and Tablets) and Java Edition (PC and Mac)

snippet.description:

🍕Lyrics:

[Verse 1: Miguel]
I pled my case with the Gods, woman
Just place your sweet shackles on my mind
I’m bound to an ocean of weightless love
No mercy, no pardon for stolen time

[Chorus: Miguel]
When the gavel hit the stand
I'm damned to loving you
Two palm trees in the sand
I'm damned to loving you now
We set fire to these skies for our love
And I'd do it all again
I'm damned to loving you, alright
Yeah, woman
Loving you, yeah

[Verse 2: Miguel]
Curse the stars now there’s no escape
'Cause your walls are my favourite vice
Two hearts committed to hopeless fate
I’d serve my life sentence a thousand times, woman

[Chorus: Miguel]
When the gavel hit the stand
I'm damned to loving you
Two palm trees in the sand
I'm damned to loving you now
We set fire to these skies for our love
And I’d do it all again
I’m damned to loving you, alright

I'm damned to loving you
Two palm trees in the sand
I'm damned to loving you now
We set fire to these skies for our love
And I'd do it all again
I'm damned to loving you

[Bridge: Miguel]
Like you’ve owned my love (Yeah)
In every life before
(Every life baby)
And every life I live (Every time I)
You're all I'm searching for
(Looking for you now)

(Looking for you baby)
In every life before
(Longing for you darling)

(In every life now)
You're all I'm searching for (yeah)

I'm damned to loving you
Two palm trees in the sand
I'm damned to loving you now
We set fire to these skies for our love

I'm damned to loving you
When the gavel hit the stand

I’m damned to loving you
Two palm trees in the sand
(Can’t get away from it now)
I’m damned to loving you
We set fire to these skies for our love
(Do it together alright)
And I’d do it all again
'Cause I’m damned to loving you, now
(Loving you baby, yeah)
You know I'd do that again for ya
I’m damned of loving you
